fixes.recommendedFix: Add a descriptive page title that clearly reflects the page purpose and kennel offering.
fixes.beforePreview: Before: the page renders without a meaningful <title> tag.
fixes.afterPreview: After: the page includes a clear, unique title in the document metadata.
fixes.implementationNotes: Update the page metadata export or head configuration in the matching Next.js route.

fixes.recommendedFix: Add a concise meta description that explains the page content and encourages clicks from search results.
fixes.beforePreview: Before: the page has no meta description content for search engines or social previews.
fixes.afterPreview: After: the page includes a concise, unique meta description.
fixes.implementationNotes: Update the Next.js metadata export for the page and keep the description aligned with the visible content.
